Message: BG_E_NOT_FOUND - The requested job was not found
Resolution: The BITS transfer job no longer exists. Content may need to be re-requested.

Message: BG_E_INVALID_STATE - The requested action is not allowed in the current job state
Resolution: BITS job is in an unexpected state. Reset the BITS service and retry.

Message: BG_E_EMPTY - There are no files attached to this job
Resolution: The BITS job has no files. Content may not have been properly added to the transfer.

Message: BG_E_TOO_MANY_FILES - No more files can be added to this job
Resolution: The BITS job has too many files. This may indicate content packaging issues.

Message: BG_E_TOO_MANY_JOBS - The service is being used by too many jobs
Resolution: Too many concurrent BITS jobs. Wait for existing transfers to complete or cancel stale jobs.

Message: BG_E_DUPLICATE_FILES - The file was already added to the job
Resolution: Duplicate file in the BITS job. Clear and re-request the content.

Message: BG_E_FILE_NOT_AVAILABLE - No file is available because no URL generated an error
Resolution: BITS could not access the source file. Check DP accessibility.

Message: BG_E_PROTOCOL_NOT_AVAILABLE - The requested protocol is not available
Resolution: The protocol (HTTP/HTTPS/SMB) is not available. Check DP configuration and firewall.
No network connectivity. Verify the network adapter and connectivity to the DP.

Message: BG_E_MISSING_FILE_SIZE - The server did not return the file size
Resolution: The DP web server did not return Content-Length. Check IIS configuration on the DP.

Message: BG_E_INSUFFICIENT_RANGE_SUPPORT - The server does not support the necessary HTTP protocol
Resolution: The DP does not support HTTP range requests. Check IIS configuration.

Message: BG_E_INSUFFICIENT_HTTP_SUPPORT - The server does not support the necessary HTTP protocol
Resolution: The server does not support required HTTP features. Verify IIS configuration on the DP.

Message: BG_E_REMOTE_NOT_SUPPORTED - The download location is a remote share but BITS is configured for HTTP only
Resolution: BITS is set to use HTTP but the DP is configured for SMB. Check the DP settings.

Message: BG_E_NEW_OWNER_DIFF_MAPPING - The drive mapping for the job is different for the current owner
Resolution: The BITS job owner changed. This can happen when switching between SYSTEM and user context.

Message: BG_E_HTTP_ERROR_403 - The server requires authorization and the provided credentials were rejected
Resolution: Access denied on the DP. Check IIS authentication settings and the machine account credentials.

Message: BG_E_HTTP_ERROR_404 - The requested URL does not exist on the server
Resolution: Content not found on the DP. Redistribute the content package.

Message: BG_E_HTTP_ERROR_503 - The service is temporarily overloaded
Resolution: The DP IIS service is overloaded. Wait and retry. Check DP health.

Message: BG_E_BLOCKED_BY_POLICY - Group Policy prevents BITS from transferring data
Resolution: Check GPO settings that restrict BITS usage (bandwidth throttling, blocked hours).
